sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; const Blog = () => { const blogPosts = [ { id: 1, title: 'From Code to Client: Freelancing Success in Tech', excerpt: 'Freelancing in the tech industry can be both rewarding and challenging. As a freelancer, you have the freedom to choose your projects, set your rates, and work from anywhere...', author: 'Ishu Raj', date: '2024-02-15', views: 987, likes: 36, image: '/images/blog/latest-insights/7.jpeg', category: 'Freelancing' }, { id: 2, title: 'Future of Remote Work in 2024', excerpt: 'The landscape of remote work continues to evolve rapidly. As we navigate through 2024, companies and professionals are adapting to new technologies and work methodologies...', author: 'Ishu Raj', date: '2024-02-10', views: 1234, likes: 58, image: '/images/blog/latest-insights/5.jpeg', category: 'Remote Work' }, { id: 3, title: 'Real-World Software Solutions: My Development Journey', excerpt: 'In this post, I share my personal journey through the world of software development, from my first lines of code to creating impactful solutions for real-world problems...', author: 'Ishu Raj', date: '2024-02-05', views: 1500, likes: 72, image: '/images/blog/latest-insights/10.jpeg', category: 'Development' } ]; return (
{/* Blog Hero */}

Blog & Insights

Thoughts on technology, development, and the future of work

{/* Blog Posts */}
{blogPosts.map(post => (
{post.category}

{post.title}

{post.excerpt}

By {post.author} {new Date(post.date).toLocaleDateString()}
{post.views} {post.likes}
))}
{/* Newsletter Section */}

Stay Updated

Subscribe to my newsletter for the latest insights on technology, development, and business growth.

); }; export default Blog;
